Why Shrinking Price Differences Between Walmart, Kroger, And Albertsons Matter To Investors
data.description: JPMorgan survey shows narrowing price gaps between Walmart, Kroger, and Albertsons as retailers adjust strategies to attract price-sensitive consumers.

data.title: How Widespread Is Market Weakness? Examining Whether The Market Has Bad Breadth
data.description: As a bull market reaches an exhaustion point, market breadth indicators often tend to diverge from the price action of the benchmarks.  This "breadth divergence" occurs as leading names begin to falter, and initial selling drives some stocks down to new swing lows.
